{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}{{ page.title }} · Bop documentation{% endblock title %} {% block description %}{{ page.description | default(value=config.description) }}{% endblock description %} {% block og_title %}{{ page.title }} · Bop{% endblock og_title %} {% block body_class %}docs-page{% endblock body_class %} {% block content %} {% set doc = page %} {% include "partials/docs-article.html" %} {% endblock content %}
